Dominant observed values: 2=STAT_CHANGE x462, 9=INTERRUPT x119, 1=DAMAGE x102, 3=HEAL x90, 6=AP_CHANGE x86, 17=AP_REGEN_CHANGE x59, 10=RESSURRECT x30, 27 x29. Values not yet present in the ComponentOperation enum represent undocumented operation type codes observed in client data.
